audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. version_at_epoch is a pure function: (1) phase_at_epoch deterministically maps epoch to Phase via immutable fork_epoch fields; (2) version maps Phase to Version via immutable fork_version fields; (3) Config is wrapped in Arc (immutable after creation); (4) no interior mutability affects fork epochs or versions (OnceCell only for derived constants). For any given Config and epoch, exactly one version is returned.
